title: MELTS: 2025-2026 Attack Timeline
description: Time-series view of the modern attack scenarios across endpoint, web, application, network, firewall, and cloud-control-plane logs. Use this as the first pivot before drilling into attack-specific widgets.
query: ('Trace ID' = 'trace_clickfix_2026_001' or 'Trace ID' = 'trace_toolshell_sp_001' or 'Trace ID' = 'trace_rmm_2025_001' or 'Trace ID' = 'trace_aitm_token_2026_001' or 'Threat Name' = 'ClickFix Clipboard Execution' or 'Threat Name' = 'CrashFix Python RAT' or 'Threat Name' = 'RMM Tool Abuse' or 'Threat Name' = 'AiTM Token Replay' or 'Request URL' like '*spinstall0.aspx*' or 'Command Line' like '*ClickFix*' or 'Command Line' like '*CrashFix*' or 'Process Name' like '*ScreenConnect*' or 'Process Name' like '*AnyDesk*' or 'Process Name' like '*AteraAgent*' or 'User Name' = 'codeofconduct-reader@corp.example.com') | timestats span = 1hour count as Events by 'Log Source'

ask_ai_prompts: Build a chronological threat-hunting timeline for these attacks.
Which log source saw the entry point first?
